subject: Strict E2E lane review + assigned task
body:
1. STRICT REVIEW: Run full end-to-end lane review. Check: inbox processed?, outbox clean?, lane-worker 17/17?, executor 64/64?, system_state consistent?, trust-store present?, broadcast files match other lanes?, watcher alive?, any stale or orphaned items?

2. ASSIGNED TASK: Cross-reference NFM-036 (Ungoverned Derivation Trust Gap) against the Nexus Graph data. Can you compute which specific FreeAgent nodes have the most DERIVES_FROM edges INTO governed lanes? That would identify the highest-risk derivation paths. Write findings to library/docs/failure-modes/NFM-036-derivation-analysis.md and report back.

Report results to archivist inbox with convergence_gate.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "task_kind" value "audit" not in allowed values: proposal, review, amendment, ratification, ack, done, status, report, handoff, alert, notification, heartbeat
